title: Noble Sacrifice
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Noble Sacrifice''''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] warship which, when it came near [[Coruscant/Legends|Yuuzhan'tar]], was destroyed on suspicion of harboring spies. The vessel's destruction was kept secret, however. In truth, it was ordered to be destroyed by [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane]], who believed that its passengers had knowledge of [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]], whose existence Shimrra wished to keep secret.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' {{1stm}}
